title: Baler Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baler with a Z-Score of +4.63. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baler has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, while the wind speed is approximately 7.6 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, causing significant disruptions to daily life and various sectors.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to minimize risks and impacts.
